sentence: 孙武是中国历史上著名的军事家。
pinyin: Sūn Wǔ shì Zhōng guó lì shǐ shàng zhù míng de jūn shì jiā.
english: Sun Wu (Sun Tzu) is a famous military strategist in Chinese history.

meaning: to make money by selling sth
sentence: 他把闲置的旧书拿去卖钱了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xián zhì de jiù shū ná qù mài qián le.
english: He sold his idle old books to make some money.

sentence: 这款网络应用用起来非常方便。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn wǎng luò yìng yòng yòng qǐ lái fēi cháng fāng biàn.
english: This network application is very easy to use.

sentence: 他去南亚旅游了一个月。
pinyin: Tā qù nán yà lǚ yóu le yī gè yuè.
english: He traveled in South Asia for a month.

sentence: 几位政府大员出席了开幕式。
pinyin: Jǐ wèi zhèng fǔ dà yuán chū xí le kāi mù shì.
english: Several senior government officials attended the opening ceremony.
